notFound.title: Content not found
notFound.description: The content you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

unavailable.title: Content not available in this language
unavailable.description: This page has not been translated yet. You can read the French version or return to the knowledge home.

home.title: Personal knowledge repository
home.intro1: Welcome to my personal knowledge repository. Here I share a condensed overview of concepts I have learned throughout my journey. The repository is organized into themed sections. Use the left sidebar to browse topics, click a title to open it, or use the arrow to expand subtopics. You can also navigate the current page with the table of contents on the right.
home.intro2: This repository is not designed as a traditional course, but as a synthesis of each topic with the essentials to remember. Many courses and tools can help you learn these subjects in depth. If you want to go further, do your own research or ask a LLM for more detail. With the constant flow of information we receive, we forget quickly and retain little. This repository helps you revisit concepts and recover what may have been forgotten.
home.mathematicsText: In the mathematics section, I share important theoretical concepts, mainly around probability and statistics. I also added interactive visuals to explore functions such as probability distributions, along with code examples related to these topics.
home.programmingText: The programming section differs from a typical programming course. I focus more on concepts and algorithmic principles—general or language-specific—rather than syntax alone. A programmer's real challenge is not writing code in a given language, but understanding systems and applications, the problems that arise, and how to solve them.
home.dataText: Data has become a major stake for companies. Organizations increasingly want to leverage data to improve performance, organization, and logistics, and to build data-driven decision making. Data governance matters too, and helping companies manage their data responsibly is part of the picture.

statisticalTests.title: Statistical tests
statisticalTests.description: A practical guide to statistical tests—from theory to application—so you can choose and run the right test for your data.
